sections.title: 七、读句子，找出与其含义相符的单词
sections.instruction: 读句子，找出与其含义相符的单词，将其标号填写在括号内。

questions.prompt: A person who has won something.
questions.translation: 赢了某物（如比赛）的人。
questions.explanation: winner 意为“赢家、获胜者”，与句意“赢得某物的人”相符。

questions.prompt: A problem or something causes troubles.
questions.translation: 一个问题或引起麻烦的事物。
questions.explanation: difficulty 意为“困难、难题”，与“引起麻烦的问题或事物”含义一致。

questions.prompt: To give someone money for something you buy or for a service.
questions.translation: 为你买的东西或服务付钱给某人。
questions.explanation: pay 意为“付款、支付”，与“给某人钱以购买物品或服务”含义一致。

questions.prompt: The name of a book, film, or piece of music.
questions.translation: 书、电影或音乐的名称。
questions.explanation: title 意为“标题、名称（书名/电影名等）”，与句意一致。

questions.prompt: It means being active, happy and wanting to have fun.
questions.translation: 它意味着活跃、快乐并想要玩得开心。
questions.explanation: playful 意为“爱玩耍的、幽默的”，与“活跃、快乐并想找乐子”相符。

sections.title: 八、读语段，选择恰当的句子补全对话
sections.instruction: 读语段，选择恰当的句子补全对话。

dialogue.speaker: Xiaoyu
dialogue.text: Hi, Jiahang. You took part in the Learn from Lei Feng Activities, right?

dialogue.speaker: Xiaoyu
dialogue.text: Sounds great! Where did you do the volunteer work?

dialogue.speaker: Jiahang
dialogue.text: We cleaned their rooms and washed their clothes carefully.

dialogue.speaker: Jiahang
dialogue.text: Sure, we sang songs and read stories to make them happy.

dialogue.speaker: Xiaoyu
dialogue.text: I believe it was a special day. How did you feel at last?

options: We went to the Old People's Home near our school.
I joined the volunteer activities with my classmates.
I felt very happy and proud to help these old people.
Did you give them any shows?
What did you do to help the old people there?

questions.answer: I joined the volunteer activities with my classmates.
questions.translation: 我和我的同班同学一起参加了志愿者活动。
questions.explanation: 佳航回答“Yes”，并说明参与的具体形式，选择该句符合上下文。

questions.answer: We went to the Old People's Home near our school.
questions.translation: 我们去了学校附近的敬老院。
questions.explanation: 小宇提问“Where”（在哪里），佳航回答具体地点，故选择该句。

questions.answer: What did you do to help the old people there?
questions.translation: 你做了什么去帮助那里的老人？
questions.explanation: 佳航回答具体打扫房间、洗衣服等，可知问句是问做了什么。

questions.answer: Did you give them any shows?
questions.translation: 你们给他们表演节目了吗？
questions.explanation: 佳航说“Sure, we sang songs...”，表示回答“是否表演了节目”的提问。

questions.answer: I felt very happy and proud to help these old people.
questions.translation: 帮助这些老人我感到非常高兴和自豪。
questions.explanation: 小宇询问“How did you feel at last?”，回答应是具体的内心感受。

sections.title: 九、根据短文内容选择恰当的单词
sections.instruction: 根据短文内容选择恰当的单词，将其标号填写在括号内。
sections.passage: Yesterday I went to the school library with my friends. I [1] very happy to read there. At first, I [2] a list of my favourite books. Storybooks were fun, [3] I also enjoyed science books. I learned a lot from those interesting [4]. At [5], I borrowed three books and went home happily.

questions.translation: 昨天的状况，用过去式 was。
questions.explanation: Yesterday 提示过去时间，第一人称单数 I 对应 was。

questions.translation: 起初，我列了书单。
questions.explanation: 发生在过去的事，动词用过去式 made。

questions.translation: 故事书很有趣，但我同样喜欢科学书。
questions.explanation: 前后句有轻微转折，故选 but。

questions.translation: 我从那些有趣的故事中学到了很多。
questions.explanation: those 修饰复数名词，选 stories。

questions.translation: 最后，我借了三本书。
questions.explanation: at last 是固定短语，表示“最后，终于”。

sections.title: 十、读图片故事，根据内容选择恰当的单词
sections.instruction: 从词库中选择恰当的单词填空。

questions.prompt: Yesterday, the girl got ready to go out with her cute dog happily. They came into the woods and began an ______.
questions.translation: 昨天，女孩高兴地准备和她可爱的狗一起出门。他们来到森林里，开始了一次冒险。
questions.explanation: an 后面接元音音素开头的名词，adventure（冒险）符合句意。

questions.prompt: They ______ on the long path in the forest.
questions.translation: 他们走在森林里长长的小径上。
questions.explanation: 走在长长的小路（path）上，使用动词 walk 的过去式 walked。

questions.prompt: On the way, they ______ see lovely animals in the wild.
questions.translation: 在路上，他们能看到野生环境中可爱的动物。
questions.explanation: could 意为“能够”，用作情态动词修饰动词原形 see。

questions.prompt: And then, she decided to go ______ following the sign.
questions.translation: 接着，她决定顺着指示牌朝西走。
questions.explanation: go west 意为“向西走”，表示方向。

questions.prompt: In the end, they stopped to enjoy the beauty of ______.
questions.translation: 最后，他们停下来欣赏大自然的美丽。
questions.explanation: beauty of nature 意为“大自然的美丽”，nature 为名词。

sections.title: 十一、阅读读书报告，判断正误
sections.instruction: 阅读读书报告，判断下列表述是否正确，正确的选 T，错误的选 F。
sections.passage:
MY Book Report
Written by Amy  Date: January 5, 2026
Title: The Adventures of Tom Sawyer  Writer: Mark Twain
What happened in the story?
A naughty boy named Tom Sawyer lived in a small town. He had many exciting adventures with his friends. He found treasure, helped people in trouble, and grew into a brave and kind boy.
Rating: ★★
Pages: 312
Would you recommend this book? Why or why not?
Yes! The book tells us the fun of childhood. Tom is lively and smart. It is a great book to show us courage, friendship and the beauty of growing up!

questions.prompt: This book report was written by Mark Twain.
questions.translation: 这份读书报告是马克·吐温写的。
questions.explanation: 读书报告由 Amy 撰写（Written by Amy），Mark Twain 是该书作者（Writer）。

questions.prompt: The story happened in a big city.
questions.translation: 故事发生在一个大城市里。
questions.explanation: 文中提到故事发生在一个小镇（lived in a small town）。

questions.prompt: Tom Sawyer had many exciting adventures on his own.
questions.translation: 汤姆·索亚独自一人经历了许多兴奋刺激的冒险。
questions.explanation: 文中写到是“with his friends”（和他的朋友们）。

questions.prompt: Tom Sawyer found treasure and helped people in trouble.
questions.translation: 汤姆·索亚找到了宝藏并帮助了处于困境中的人们。
questions.explanation: 文中明确写明“He found treasure, helped people in trouble”。

questions.prompt: The book is about courage, friendship and growing up.
questions.translation: 这本书是关于勇气、友谊和成长的。
questions.explanation: 文中最后一句话提到“show us courage, friendship and the beauty of growing up!”。

sections.title: 十二、读文章了解社区志愿者，根据内容选择正确的选项
sections.instruction: 读文章了解社区志愿者，根据内容选择正确的选项。
sections.passage:
Volunteers in the Community

There are many ways to be a volunteer in your community. Let's see what we can do to help others and the place we live in.
First, we can keep our community clean. Pick up rubbish on the streets and cans in the park. Then put them in the recycle bin. This makes the community tidy and beautiful.
Next, we can help kids in need. If we have old toys, clean them first. Put the clean toys in a box and take them to the hospital. Toys can make the ill children feel warm and not lonely. They will be very happy to get these toys with love.
We can also help animals. You can go to an animal shelter in your community. It's helpful to clean the cages for the animals, feed them or take them for a walk. Loving animals is also a kind of volunteer work.
Being a volunteer is great. We can start with small things, and every small help makes the community better.

questions.prompt: Where should we put the bottles and cans we pick up?
questions.translation: 我们捡起的瓶罐应该放在哪里？
questions.explanation: 根据第二段“Then put them in the recycle bin”可知应放进回收箱。

questions.prompt: What do we need to do with old toys before giving them to other kids?
questions.translation: 在把旧玩具送给其他孩子之前，我们需要做什么？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段“If we have old toys, clean them first”可知赠送前需清洁。

questions.prompt: Why do ill children love the clean toys from volunteers?
options: The toys are very new and expensive.
Toys can make them feel warm, happy and not lonely.
They can sell the toys for money.
questions.translation: 为什么生病的孩子喜欢志愿者送的干净玩具？
questions.explanation: 根据第三段“Toys can make the ill children feel warm and not lonely”可知喜欢的原因。

questions.prompt: If we want to help animals at the animal shelter, we CANNOT ______
options: play with the animals all day
questions.translation: 如果我们想在收容所里帮助动物，我们不能做什么？
questions.explanation: 第四段列举的活动有打扫笼子、喂食或带去散步，不包含整天陪玩。

questions.prompt: What is the main idea of the passage?
options: How to pick up rubbish in the park
How to take toys to the hospital
How to be a volunteer and help the community
questions.translation: 这篇文章的中心思想是什么？
questions.explanation: 文章主要讲述了如何通过小事成为志愿者帮助社区。

sections.title: 十三、读文章，按要求完成任务
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，完成短文后相应的任务。
sections.passage:
Libraries to Go

Do you often go to libraries? What is the library like in your city? In fact, there are many different libraries around the world.
Camel Library
In small villages in Kenya, Africa, many kids love to read. But there are no roads only sand. Cars and trucks cannot go there, so camels carry library books to the children. Two camels carry books and a small tent. The librarian sets up the tent and lets kids read quietly. New books come to the villages every two weeks.
Elephant Library
In the mountains of Thailand, elephants carry books in strong metal boxes. The boxes can keep books safe from heavy rain and the wet weather there.
Boat Library
Indonesia has many islands. People travel by water, so library boats stop at small villages and leave new books for the people there.
The most important part of these special libraries is bringing people not only books, but also joy and hope.

questions.prompt: Why can't cars reach Kenyan villages?
questions.translation: 为什么汽车无法到达肯尼亚的村庄？
questions.explanation: “But there are no roads only sand. Cars and trucks cannot go there”表明没有路只有沙子。

questions.prompt: What protects books from rain in Thailand?
questions.translation: 在泰国，什么保护图书免受雨淋？
questions.explanation: “elephants carry books in strong metal boxes. The boxes can keep books safe from heavy rain”表明是用金属箱子。

questions.prompt: How do people in Indonesia get library books?
questions.translation: 印度尼西亚的人们是如何获得图书馆图书的？
questions.explanation: “Indonesia has many islands. People travel by water, so library boats stop...”表明通过坐船配送。

questions.prompt: What do these special libraries bring to people far from cities?
questions.translation: 这些特殊的图书馆为人们带来了什么？
questions.explanation: 末尾总结提到“bringing people not only books, but also joy and hope”。

questions.prompt: Which special library would you like to visit? Why?
questions.answer: I would like to visit Boat Library because I want to experience how library boats travel between islands and deliver books.
questions.translation: 你想参观哪一个特殊的图书馆？为什么？
questions.explanation: 开放性主观问答，提供合理的表达和支撑原因即可。

sections.title: 一、读句子，选择最佳选项
sections.instruction: 读句子，选择可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.prompt: -Where ___ you yesterday morning? - I ___ at home.
questions.translation: —昨天早上你在哪里？ —我在家里。
questions.explanation: 主语 you 搭配 were，主语 I 搭配 was。

questions.prompt: My parents ___ very busy last weekend.
questions.translation: 我的父母上周末非常忙。
questions.explanation: last weekend 提示过去时，主语复数 parents 用 were。

questions.prompt: Tom ___ a new bike on his birthday last week.
questions.translation: 汤姆上周生日买了一辆新自行车。
questions.explanation: 过去时间 last week 提示动词用过去式 bought。

questions.prompt: She ___ to the museum with her classmates every Friday.
questions.translation: 她每周五都和同学去博物馆。
questions.explanation: every Friday 提示一般现在时，主语 She 用 goes。

questions.prompt: It ___ rainy yesterday, so we ___ at home.
questions.translation: 昨天天气下雨，所以我们待在家里。
questions.explanation: 过去时间 yesterday 提示全句使用一般过去时，主语 It 搭配 was，后面用动词过去式 stayed。

sections.title: 二、阅读短文，选择恰当的单词填空
sections.instruction: 阅读短文，从词库中选择恰当的单词填空。其中有一项为多余选项。
sections.passage: Last summer holiday, I joined a countryside volunteer program. The village was far from the city. I lived [1] a kind local family for two weeks. They looked after me well. On the [2] day, we walked to a small mountain primary school. When we arrived, we [3] the classrooms and talked with the students. The classrooms [4] small but clean. The students were lovely. We played games and taught them English songs. Though our time was short, it was meaningful. It [5] me the importance of helping others. I will never forget this trip.

questions.translation: live with sb 意为“与某人一起居住”。
questions.explanation: 固定搭配 live with sb 表示跟某人一同居住。

questions.translation: 在第三天，我们步行去了一所山里的小学。
questions.explanation: On the third day 意为“在第三天”，用作顺序指示。

questions.translation: 我们参观了教室并与学生们交谈。
questions.explanation: 与 and 后的 talked 并列，且描述过去行为，用过去式 visited。

questions.translation: 教室虽小但很干净。
questions.explanation: 主语 classrooms 是复数且时态为过去，系动词用 were。

questions.translation: 它教会了我帮助他人的重要性。
questions.explanation: 主语 It 代指旅行经历，使用 teach 的过去式 taught。
